ModMetaData.name: Unturned枪械: Unturned Guns[1.0]
ModMetaData.author: [cn]nuclear
ModMetaData.description: 这些枪械都是Unturned的玩过un的都知道，总共有68把Unturned的枪。 枪械列表《gun list》： Ace Augewehr Avenger Backlash Bane Bluntforce Compound Bow Bulldog Card Chimera Cobalt Cobra Colt Crossbow Dagger Desert Falcon Determinator Dragonfang Eaglefire Ekho Empire Fuilaut Fury Grizzly Hawkhound Heartbreaker Hollowcharge Honeybadger Hospitality Judgement Kopis Kryzkarek Lancer Rocket Launcher Lockdown Luger Maplestrike Masterkey Matamorez MP40 Nailgun Nightraider Nykorev Peacemaker Quadbarrel Sabertooth Sawed off Scalar Schofield Shadowstalker ShadowstalkerMKII Snayperskya Sportshot Swissgewehr Tekowvka Timberwolf Viper Vonya Wezel Yuri Zubknakov 抛投物列表《Grenade List》： Grenade Flashbang smoke Grenade Impact Grenade stickiness Grenade
